description: Use this skill for interactive work on X.com — posting, searching/collecting, opening bookmarks/notifications/profile/Grok, liking/bookmarking focused posts, replying, and other live browser actions. Prefer the verified X composite tools first when they fit. For plain X status URLs that the user wants fetched/read, start with web_fetch and answer from that unless more interaction is requested.

defaultWorkflow: For explicit X posting/search/open-page/focused-like/focused-bookmark requests, use the verified x_* composite tools first when available.
For plain X post/thread URL reading, use web_fetch first.
Fallback to manual visual-first browser automation only when the composite does not fit or fails.
